description: Create a 3-class land cover map named management_zones using the multispectral image at ~/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (Band 2: NIR, Band 3: Red). The classification must be based on NDVI calculated as (band_2 - band_3) / (band_2 + band_3), outputting the following integer values: 1 (Soil) for NDVI < 0.2; 2 (Sparse Vegetation) for 0.2 <= NDVI < 0.5; and 3 (Dense Vegetation) for NDVI >= 0.5. Save the resulting product to ~/snap_projects/vegetation_zones.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to ~/snap_exports/vegetation_zones.tif.
